name: learn-faster
description: FASTER framework learning coach with spaced repetition, active practice, and exam generation.

interface.shortDescription: Learn topics with syllabi, reviews, progress, practice, and exams.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native learning coach built around the FASTER framework: Forget distractions, Act through practice, manage State, Teach back concepts, Enter learning time, and Review with spaced repetition. Includes explicit skills for learning, review, progress reporting, practice, and exam generation.
defaultPrompt: Use $learn-faster-progress to show my learning progress.
Use $learn-faster-exam to make a mock exam.
